title: valeriana langei
intro: Valeriana langei is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the valerian or valeriana. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anxiolytic effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The health benefits of valeriana langei include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, as well as its use as a natural remedy for muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Valeriana langei can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
